label: PASS
rationale: C_EC_521 values section says p, r, b, x, and y are default values for new rows when those associated columns are not specified at table creation. The CreateRow supplies only Name/CommonName and columns 8-13, so columns 3-7 are omitted curve columns; the target Get returns the documented P-521 p/r/b/x/y values.

label: FAIL
rationale: C_EC_521 omitted curve columns 3-7 must default to the documented P-521 p/r/b/x/y values. The target Get returns zero for column 3 (p) instead of the documented P-521 prime, even though the remaining curve defaults match.

label: PASS
rationale: The C_EC_163 values section identifies K-163 default curve entries k1, k2, k3, r, a, b, x, and y, and says they are defaults for new rows when unspecified. The CreateRow supplies only the later non-curve credential columns, so the target Get of the omitted curve columns returns the documented K-163 defaults.

label: FAIL
rationale: For C_EC_163, the omitted curve columns should receive the documented K-163 defaults. The target Get returns zero for the first omitted curve column, where the values table gives k1 as 07, so the response is not protocol-compliant.

label: FAIL
